title: Chronal Conversion
description: Find register 0 values that halt a self-checking program fastest and latest.
writeup:
## Approach

The program uses the Day 19 VM and has one `eqrr` instruction comparing a computed register to r[0]. If they match, the program halts. We simulate the program, intercepting at that comparison to collect the sequence of candidate values.

## Part 1

The first value compared against r[0] — setting r[0] to this halts the program in the fewest instructions.

## Part 2

The sequence of compared values eventually cycles. The last unique value before repeating causes the program to execute the most instructions before halting.
